name: Color
doc: Color trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> Color

props.name: copy_id
props.doc: Color channel ID to copy from (a50)

methods.name: set_rgb
methods.sig: def set_rgb(r: int, g: int, b: int, duration: float = 0) -> Self
methods.doc: Set red, green, blue and duration in one call.

methods.name: set_hex
methods.sig: def set_hex(hex_str: str, duration: float = 0) -> Self
methods.doc: Parse a hex string like '#FF8800' and set red/green/blue and duration.

name: Pulse
doc: Pulse trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> Pulse

props.name: use_hsv
props.doc: Use HSV mode instead of RGB (a48)

props.name: copy_id
props.doc: Color channel ID to copy from (a50)

props.name: target_id
props.doc: Group or color channel ID to pulse (a51)

props.name: target_type
props.doc: False = color channel target, True = group target (a52)

name: Alpha
doc: Alpha trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> Alpha

props.name: target_id
props.doc: Target ID to change opacity of (a51)

name: Toggle
doc: Toggle trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> Toggle

name: Animate
doc: Animate trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> Animate

props.name: target_id
props.doc: Group ID of the animated object (a51)

name: Spawn
doc: Spawn trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> Spawn

props.name: remaps
props.doc: Group ID remaps applied when spawning: {source: target} (a442)

props.name: delay_rand
props.doc: Random additional delay range in seconds (a556)

props.name: reset_remap
props.doc: Block incoming remaps from affecting this trigger's spawns (a581)

methods.name: add_remap
methods.sig: def add_remap(source: int, target: int) -> Self
methods.doc: Add a single source->target remap entry. Raises if source is already mapped differently.

methods.name: remove_remap
methods.doc: Remove a single remap entry by source ID.

name: Touch
doc: Touch trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> Touch

props.name: target_id
props.doc: Target ID to activate on touch (a51)

props.name: hold_mode
props.doc: Activate while held, deactivate on release (a81)

props.name: dual_mode
props.doc: Activate on both player touch areas (a89)

props.name: only_player
props.doc: Restrict to player 1, player 2, or both (a198)

name: Follow
doc: Follow trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> Follow

name: Shake
doc: Shake trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> Shake

props.name: interval
props.doc: Time between shake steps in seconds (a84)

name: FollowPlayerY
doc: Follow Player Y trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> FollowPlayerY

props.name: target_id
props.doc: Group ID to apply the follow effect to (a51)

props.name: speed
props.doc: How fast the target follows the player Y position (a90)

props.name: delay
props.doc: Delay before following begins in seconds (a91)

props.name: offset
props.doc: Y offset applied to the follow position (a92)

name: AdvFollow
doc: Advanced Follow trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> AdvFollow

props.name: target_id
props.doc: Group ID to apply the follow behaviour to (a51)

props.name: player_1
props.doc: Follow player 1 instead of a group (a138)

props.name: player_2
props.doc: Follow player 2 instead of a group (a200)

props.name: target_dir
props.doc: Orient movement towards the target direction (a305)

props.name: x_only
props.doc: Constrain follow to X axis only (a306)

props.name: y_only
props.doc: Constrain follow to Y axis only (a307)

props.name: max_range
props.doc: Maximum distance at which following is active (a308)

props.name: break_angle
props.doc: Angle threshold in degrees at which braking activates (a328)

props.name: break_steer_speed_limit
props.doc: Speed limit below which brake steer activates (a332)

props.name: break_steer_speed_limit_rand
props.doc: Random additional brake steer speed limit range (a333)

props.name: acceleration
props.doc: Acceleration force applied towards max speed (a334)

props.name: ignore_disabled
props.doc: Continue following even when target group is disabled (a336)

props.name: rotate_dir
props.doc: Rotate the target object to face movement direction (a339)

props.name: rot_offset
props.doc: Rotation offset in degrees applied on top of direction (a340)

props.name: near_accel
props.doc: Extra acceleration applied when near the target (a357)

props.name: near_dist
props.doc: Distance threshold for near acceleration to activate (a359)

props.name: rot_deadzone
props.doc: Angle deadzone in degrees before rotation updates (a364)

props.name: priority
props.doc: Execution priority when multiple AdvFollow triggers affect the same group (a365)

props.name: max_range_ref
props.doc: Group ID used as reference for max range measurement (a366)

props.name: friction
props.doc: Friction applied to movement each frame (a558)

props.name: start_speed_ref
props.doc: Group ID used as reference for start speed direction (a560)

props.name: near_friction
props.doc: Extra friction applied when near the target (a561)

props.name: start_dir_ref
props.doc: Group ID used as reference for start direction (a565)

props.name: exclusive
props.doc: Override all other AdvFollow triggers on the same target (a571)

props.name: init
props.doc: Initialisation mode when trigger activates: INIT / SET / ADD (a572)

name: EditAdvFollow
doc:
Edit Advanced Follow trigger. Modifies an active AdvFollow trigger at runtime.
    Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> EditAdvFollow

    Most properties mirror AdvFollow exactly. The M_xxx named fields are properties
    that exist in the GD data but whose exact purpose is not yet documented.

props.name: target_id
props.doc: Group ID of the AdvFollow trigger to edit (a51)

props.name: use_control_id
props.doc: Use control ID to target specific AdvFollow instance (a535)

props.name: speed_ref
props.doc: Group ID used as reference for speed direction (a560)

props.name: dir_ref
props.doc: Group ID used as reference for direction (a565)

props.name: redirect_dir
props.doc: Redirect current movement direction rather than resetting it (a570)

name: Pickup
doc: Pickup trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> Pickup

props.name: count
props.doc: Amount to add/multiply/divide the item by (a77)

props.name: override
props.doc: Set item to count instead of applying the operation (a139)

name: Count
doc: Count trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> Count

props.name: target_id
props.doc: Group ID to activate when count is reached (a51)

props.name: count
props.doc: Item count value to trigger at (a77)

props.name: multi_activate
props.doc: Trigger every time count is reached, not just the first (a104)

name: InstantCount
doc: Instant Count trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> InstantCount

props.name: count
props.doc: Item count value to compare against (a77)

name: ItemCompare
doc: Item Compare trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> ItemCompare

props.name: true_id
props.doc: Group ID to spawn when comparison is true (a51)

props.name: false_id
props.doc: Group ID to spawn when comparison is false (a71)

props.name: mod_1
props.doc: Multiplier applied to item 1 before comparison (a479)

props.name: item_op_3
props.doc: Comparison operator between the two results (a482)

props.name: mod_2
props.doc: Multiplier applied to item 2 before comparison (a483)

name: ItemEdit
doc: Item Edit trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> ItemEdit

props.name: target_item_id
props.doc: Item ID to write the result into (a51)

props.name: mod
props.doc: Float modifier applied in the operation (a479)

props.name: item_op_1
props.doc: Operation between item 1 and mod: ADD/SUBTRACT/MULTIPLY/DIVIDE (a480)

props.name: item_op_2
props.doc: Operation between item 2 and the result of op1: ADD/SUBTRACT/MULTIPLY/DIVIDE (a481)

props.name: item_op_3
props.doc: Final operation applied before writing to target (a482)

name: ItemPersist
doc: Item Persist trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> ItemPersist

props.name: timer
props.doc: Persist timer rather than item counter (a494)

name: Object
doc: Wrapper base class for common objects with typed properties and helper methods.

props.name: groups
props.doc: Group IDs this object belongs to (a57)

methods.name: wrap
methods.doc: Wrap an existing ObjectType dict without creating a new object.

methods.name: add_to_group
methods.doc: Add one or more group IDs to this object's groups set.

methods.name: reset_transform
methods.doc:
Reset position, rotation, and scale back to their default values.
        Useful when constructing a clean object from a loaded level's state.

methods.name: set_position
methods.sig: def set_position(x: float, y: float) -> Self

name: Move
doc: Move trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> Move

props.name: move_x
props.doc: X distance to move in units (a28)

props.name: move_y
props.doc: Y distance to move in units (a29)

props.name: target_pos
props.doc: Group ID to use as position reference (a71)

props.name: target_axis
props.doc: Axis constraint for direction mode: none/x/y (a101)

props.name: target_center_id
props.doc: Group ID to use as movement center in direction mode (a395)

props.name: target_distance
props.doc: Distance to travel in direction mode (a396)

props.name: silent
props.doc: Silent move — no easing preview in editor (a544)

methods.name: move_by
methods.sig: def move_by(dx: float, dy: float, t: float = 0) -> Self
methods.doc: Move by a relative distance (dx, dy) over duration t.

methods.name: move_to
methods.sig: def move_to(target: int, target_pos: int, t: float) -> Self
methods.doc: Sets to target mode (move to the target's location).

methods.name: move_towards
methods.sig: def move_towards(target: int, target_dir: int, distance: float, t: float) -> Self
methods.doc: Sets to direction mode (move towards another group with distance).

methods.name: set_easing
methods.sig: def set_easing(easing: Easing, rate: float = 2.0) -> Self

name: Rotate
doc: Rotate trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> Rotate

props.name: full
props.doc: Number of full 360° rotations to add (a69)

props.name: lock_rotation
props.doc: Lock object rotation to movement direction (a70)

props.name: aim_mode
props.doc: Rotate to face another group (aim mode) (a100)

props.name: aim_target_id
props.doc: Group ID to aim towards in aim mode (a401)

props.name: aim_offset
props.doc: Angle offset applied on top of aim direction (a402)

name: Scale
doc: Scale trigger. Inherits: Object -> Trigger -> Scale

props.name: only_move
props.doc: Only move the object, do not visually scale it (a133)

props.name: div_by_x
props.doc: Divide by X scale instead of multiplying (a153)

props.name: div_by_y
props.doc: Divide by Y scale instead of multiplying (a154)

props.name: relative_rotation
props.doc: Keep rotation relative to center during scale (a452)

props.name: relative_scale
props.doc: Scale relative to current scale rather than base (a577)

methods.name: scale
methods.sig: def scale(factor: float, duration: float = 0, divide: bool = False) -> Self
methods.doc: Uniformly scale by a factor over a duration.

name: Trigger
doc:
Base class for all trigger objects with shared trigger properties.

    Inherits: Object -> Trigger

props.name: multi_trigger
props.doc: Can be triggered multiple times simultaneously (a87)
